channel.title: Md Fokhrul Islam
channel.description: Personal academic website of Md Fokhrul Islam, PhD Student & RA at the University of Virginia.

item.title: Curvature Tensors and the Geometric Architecture of Non-Euclidean Manifolds
item.description: A visual technical synthesis of connections, parallel transport, holonomy, the Riemann tensor, normal coordinates, and local volume distortion.
